title: Map Data References
html:
This folder stores cross-era map construction references that are not specific to one historical era package.

Current entries:

  • Clean-room world map data standard:

docs/sot/high-level/30-clean-room-world-map-data-standard.md. Machine-readable quality manifest: data/core/map-data/world_map_data_quality_manifest.json.

  • Open source collection seed:

open/natural-earth/110m/ with machine-readable registry and collection manifest in data/core/map-data/world_map_source_registry.json and data/core/map-data/world_map_collection_manifest.json.

  • paradox-grand-strategy/: local inventory of HOI4, CK3, and Victoria 3 map

data layers, Documents folders, and relevant local Workshop map-data signals. The Phase 1-specific crosswalk is paradox-grand-strategy/phase1-demo-cross-reference.md; its machine-readable dataset manifest is data/era-packages/southern-ming/curated/geography/phase1_map_dataset_manifest.json.

  • Ming world county-resolution package:

data/era-packages/ming-world/. This is the clean-room planning and source-collection workspace for Ming direct-rule counties, frontier military geography, tusi/native-office domains, tributary and maritime influence nodes, and county/comital-equivalent outside regions. It is not yet a complete playable map dataset.

Policy:

  • Keep this folder as reference inventory and workflow notes.
  • Do not store raw third-party game map datasets here unless a license review

explicitly allows it.

  • Promote only project-authored conclusions, source-backed historical claims,

or generated Celestial Mandate outputs into data/.
plainText: Map Data References This folder stores cross era map construction references that are not specific to one historical era package. Current entries: Clean room world map data standard: docs/sot/high level/30 clean room world map data standard.md. Machine readable quality manifest: data/core/map data/world map data quality manifest.json. Open source collection seed: open/natural earth/110m/ with machine readable registry and collection manifest in data/core/map data/world map source registry.json and data/core/map data/world map collection manifest.json. paradox grand strategy/: local inventory of HOI4, CK3, and Victoria 3 map data layers, Documents folders, and relevant local Workshop map data signals. The Phase 1 specific crosswalk is paradox grand strategy/phase1 demo cross reference.md; its machine readable dataset manifest is data/era packages/southern ming/curated/geography/phase1 map dataset manifest.json. Ming world county resolution package: data/era packages/ming world/. This is the clean room planning and source collection workspace for Ming direct rule counties, frontier military geography, tusi/native office domains, tributary and maritime influence nodes, and county/comital equivalent outside regions. It is not yet a complete playable map dataset. Policy: Keep this folder as reference inventory and workflow notes. Do not store raw third party game map datasets here unless a license review explicitly allows it. Promote only project authored conclusions, source backed historical claims, or generated Celestial Mandate outputs into data/.
